location: Looted from a corpse partway up the wooden stairway along the exterior wall of Stormveil Castle, reached by taking the secret back-entrance route (the one Gatekeeper Gostoc hints at) up from the Stormveil Cliffside area.
tactics: From the Stormveil Cliffside Site of Grace, climb the slope/wooden steps on the right rather than pushing straight into the main castle gate.
This route is the same secret path used to sneak past the front gate ballista — watch for patrolling soldiers on the platforms.
Don't confuse this with the similarly-named Marred Wooden Shield, found via a different route on the opposite (Rampart Tower) side of the castle.
lore: A leather shield issued to Stormveil's soldiers, its surface mottled and thorn-scarred like the castle itself — a hint at the corruption Godrick's grafting has spread through his men.

builds.name: Bleed-support Strength build
builds.why: Innately builds Blood Loss (50) on guard hits, pairs well with a bleed-focused weapon in the other hand.
